pages.title: Introduction
pages.lead: Start here to understand depend and find the right setup guide.
pages.intro: depend is a multi-purpose Discord bot for moderation, automation, configuration, and everyday server management.

callout.title: Default prefix
callout.body: The default server prefix is ,. Use ,prefix set <symbol> to change it for your server, or mention depend to view the active prefix.

pages.title: Changelogs
pages.lead: Read the public release notes for depend and keep up with shipped updates.

pages.title: Moderation
pages.lead: Remove, restrict, and reverse actions against members.
pages.intro: Core moderation tools — bans, kicks, mutes, jails, purges and channel locks. Most require the Moderate Members permission.

callout.title: Permissions
callout.body: Most moderation commands need Moderate Members; destructive ones like nuke need Manage Channels.

pages.title: Anti-Nuke
pages.lead: Reversible protection against nuke attempts and mass destruction.
pages.intro: Anti-Nuke watches for mass channel/role deletions, mass bans and webhook spam. Anything past a configured threshold gets the offender stripped, jailed or banned, and the action reversed where possible.

callout.title: Owner only
callout.body: Only the server owner and antinuke admins can change Anti-Nuke configuration. Start with ,an config.

pages.title: Fake Permissions
pages.lead: Grant permissions inside depend without touching real server roles.
pages.intro: Fake Permissions let a role use depend commands as if it had a Discord permission, without granting that permission on the role itself — useful for letting trusted members moderate without real admin.

pages.title: Server Setup
pages.lead: Set up roles, system messages, automation, counters, and other server features.
pages.intro: The setup commands configure depend for your server. Run ,setup for the guided wizard, or configure pieces individually below. All require Manage Server.

callout.title: Quick start
callout.body: New here? Run ,setup for an interactive wizard that walks through prefix, logging, welcome messages and more.

pages.title: Roles
pages.lead: Create, assign, colour and manage roles, including reaction and button roles.
pages.intro: Manage roles in bulk or individually — create, delete, colour, icon, and mass-assign to humans or bots. Requires Manage Roles.

pages.title: Welcome Messages
pages.lead: Greet new members and farewell leavers with rich embeds.
pages.intro: Build join, leave and boost messages with placeholders like {user.mention} and {count}. Set a channel, then customise the message.

pages.title: Booster Roles
pages.lead: Reward server boosters with custom perks and roles.
pages.intro: Give boosters their own customisable role with a colour and name they control.

pages.title: Invite Tracking
pages.lead: Track who invited who across your server.
pages.intro: See invite counts, who invited a member, and invite leaderboards.

pages.title: Auto Responders
pages.lead: Automatic replies to messages matching a trigger.
pages.intro: Set up triggers that make depend reply automatically. Triggers match inside message content, not exact full-message matches.

pages.title: VoiceMaster
pages.lead: Temporary voice channels that members manage themselves.
pages.intro: VoiceMaster creates a temporary voice channel when someone joins the saved Join to Create channel. The owner manages that room with VoiceMaster commands and the pinned interface.

callout.title: Owner controls
callout.body: Most VoiceMaster commands only work for the current channel owner. If the owner leaves, another member can take over with ,voicemaster claim.

steps.text: VoiceMaster setup is interactive and asks which layout you want.
Pick Simple for one Join to Create channel, or Full for public/private channels and categories.

pages.title: Reaction Triggers
pages.lead: Add emoji reactions automatically when messages contain trigger words.
pages.intro: Reaction Triggers let depend react automatically when a message contains a saved trigger word. Triggers are matched inside the message content, so a saved trigger reacts anywhere that word appears.

pages.title: Logging
pages.lead: Track message, member, role, channel and invite activity.
pages.intro: Configure depend's logging so server activity is recorded to a channel. Run ,setuplogs to begin.

pages.title: Ticketing
pages.lead: A support-ticket system with a button panel and transcripts.
pages.intro: Set up a ticket panel members click to open private support threads with transcripts. Start with ,ticket setup.

pages.title: Leveling
pages.lead: XP, levels and a server economy.
pages.intro: Members rank up by chatting and being active. Configure rewards and leaderboards.

pages.title: Sticky Messages
pages.lead: Keep a message pinned to the bottom of a channel.
pages.intro: Sticky messages re-post themselves so they stay at the bottom of a channel as people chat.

pages.title: Suggestions
pages.lead: Let members submit and vote on suggestions.
pages.intro: Set up a suggestions channel where members post ideas and vote with reactions.

pages.title: Server Stats
pages.lead: Live counter channels for members, bots and boosts.
pages.intro: Create voice-channel counters that auto-update with your member, bot and boost counts.

pages.title: Embeds & Messages
pages.lead: Build named embeds and reuse them across the bot.
pages.intro: Create embeds with the builder, then reuse them in welcome, boost and vanity systems. All text fields support placeholders. Try the visual embed builder.

pages.title: Filter & Automod
pages.lead: Word filters, spam controls and native AutoMod.
pages.intro: Configure word filters, spam/caps/link controls and Discord AutoMod integration.

pages.title: Utility
pages.lead: Everyday utility commands.
pages.intro: Lookups, avatars, translation, search and other handy tools.

pages.title: Profile Lookups
pages.lead: Look up profiles across platforms.
pages.intro: Fetch profiles from Roblox, TikTok, Steam, Spotify and more.

pages.title: Music
pages.lead: Music playback built for everyone.
pages.intro: Play, queue and control music in voice channels.

pages.title: Misc Utility
pages.lead: Everything else.
pages.intro: Assorted extra commands that don't fit elsewhere.
